title: Prompt Injection Detector
summary: PoC for detecting prompt-injection attacks against LLMs. Rigorous evaluation methodology with bootstrap CI on lift over baseline.

title: DLAI Study Notes Corpus
summary: Online book corpus synthesized from deeplearning.ai short courses. Per-book .tex → MDX conversion as audit-during-conversion content quality pass. Searchable, math-rendered, with Anki flashcards.
metrics: Astro + MDX + KaTeX + BibTeX + Pagefind stack
CC-BY-NC-4.0 prose, MIT code; DLAI policy compliance

title: Applied Causal Inference
summary: Working through the causal inference literature with implementations in Julia and Python. Double-ML, time-series causal models, instrumental variables.

title: Bayesian Cold-Start
summary: Bayesian approaches to the cold-start problem in recommendation systems. Hierarchical priors for low-data regimes.
